template: Qwen-Instruct magnitude dose-response — instruction tuning asymmetrically converts V to analog, preserves K digital
key_finding: Instruction tuning asymmetrically converts encoding: K stays DIGITAL (cliff σ=0.5-1.0, shifted right from Base σ=0.3-0.5), V converts from DIGITAL to ANALOG (gradual degradation σ=1-10, no cliff). Superadditivity STRONG (9.1x at σ=1) due to K-V overlap. K > V confirmed +72-78pp. Neither Scenario A (fully analog) nor B (fully digital) — novel mixed result.
evidence_impact: Strong — resolves Base-vs-Instruct encoding strategy confound. K digital is Qwen-family-specific (architectural). V digital is Base-specific (training-dependent). Superadditivity mechanism is K-V degradation overlap. K > V extends to 4th model variant.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Test Llama-3.1-8B-Base to determine if K digital is Qwen-specific or universal for Base models. (2) Evidence consolidation. (3) Final synthesis.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space. Combined p=0.013 (K 6/56 vs V 0/57). Survives maximum-effort V-only disconfirmation.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED on spatial selectivity. Geometric/distributed confirmed by literature

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal across 3 families. Explained by attention sinks at early positions

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation UNIVERSAL: 3 families x 3 positions x 2 perturbation types + 4th variant (Qwen-Instruct). K>V gaps up to +78pp.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. Sparse attention explains V immunity

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 3 families + 4 training variants tested. V-only σ=1 immunity: 181/181 combined.

encoding_strategy.status: REVISED TAXONOMY: Qwen-Base=FULLY DIGITAL. Qwen-Instruct=MIXED (K=digital, V=analog). Llama-Instruct=FULLY ANALOG. Phi-Instruct=FULLY ANALOG. K digital is Qwen-family-specific. V digital is Base-specific.

superadditive_interaction.status: MECHANISM RESOLVED: superadditivity = K-V degradation range overlap. Qwen-Base staggered→weak(1.1x). Qwen-Instruct overlapping→strong(9.1x). Llama(7.9-16.8x). Phi(1.7-10.6x).

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent groups. Gradient bottleneck. QK/OV framework grounds K>V. K-only PGD is novel experimental validation

null_space_kv_unification.status: STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT: K-only PGD 6/56 vs V-only 0/57 (p=0.013). V-only failure is NOT hyperparameter artifact.

disruption_vs_redirection.status: V=disruption (0 numeric redirects ever), K=redirection (2 genuine numeric redirects). Quality distinction holds.

mha_vs_gqa.status: K > V holds on MHA (Phi) identically to GQA (Qwen/Llama). Phi analog encoding. GQA confound eliminated.

base_vs_instruct.status: NEW: K digital preserved by instruction tuning (Qwen-family). V digital converted to analog. Instruction tuning effect is COMPONENT-SPECIFIC.
